title: AmazonSaleReport — Example Analysis Questions
description: 10 beginner-to-intermediate data science questions for the Kaggle e-commerce sales dataset.

questions.question: Which product category generates the most total revenue?
questions.hint: Group by Category, sum Amount, sort descending.

questions.question: How does the number of orders change month by month?
questions.hint: Parse Date to datetime, extract month, count Order IDs per month.

questions.question: What percentage of all orders were cancelled?
questions.hint: Filter Status == 'Cancelled', divide by total row count, multiply by 100.

questions.question: Which 5 Indian states placed the most orders?
questions.hint: Group by ship-state, count rows, take top 5.

questions.question: What is the most popular clothing size ordered?
questions.hint: Group by Size, count Qty or rows, sort descending.

questions.question: Does Amazon-fulfilled shipping have a lower cancellation rate than merchant-fulfilled?
questions.hint: Filter by Fulfilment, calculate cancellation rate separately for each group and compare.

questions.question: Are B2B orders larger on average than B2C orders?
questions.hint: Group by B2B (True/False), compute mean of Amount for each group.

questions.question: Which size sells best within each product category?
questions.hint: Use pd.crosstab with Category and Size, aggregate Qty, then find the max per row.

questions.question: Do orders with a promotion applied have a higher or lower average order value?
questions.hint: Create a binary column from promotion-ids.notna(), then groupby and mean Amount.

questions.question: Which day of the week sees the highest total sales revenue?
questions.hint: Parse Date, extract dt.day_name(), groupby that and sum Amount.
